_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of both internal and external customers and partner organizations, including information needs, objectives, structure, capabilities, etc.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data monetization models and data product strategy, including internal data products, external data licensing, data-enabled services, and data marketplace design principles.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI LS domain. LS-K-013 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-K-006 (AB, cosine: 0.510), DQ-K-010 (DQ, cosine: 0.505).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.5/10 (raw 0.454). Shared vocabulary: [external, internal, knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [capabilities, customers, etc, information, needs, objectives] vs WIDAI-only terms [data, design, enabled, licensing, marketplace, models] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.883 (P=0.892, R=0.875). Balanced P/R — the 17-word DCWF element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:1.5%, N:76.7%, C:21.8%). No dominant classification for "Knowledge of both internal and external customers and partner organizations, inc" vs "Knowledge of data monetization models and data product strategy, including inter" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.554 > STS 0.454 (gap +0.100). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [external, internal, knowledge] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 21.4%. Shared tokens: [external, internal, knowledge]. DCWF-only: [capabilities, customers, etc, information, needs, objectives]. WIDAI-only: [data, design, enabled, licensing, marketplace, models].

signals.detail: STS 0.454 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
